params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with two selection lines (sel0 and sel1) and two data inputs (in0 and in1). The output, dout, is determined based on the values of the selection lines: when both sel lines are LOW (00), dout outputs a HIGH state; when sel0 is HIGH (01), it outputs the value of in1; when sel1 is HIGH (10), it outputs the value of in0; and when both sel lines are HIGH (11), dout is set to a known state (0).
